## Checklist

<!-- Please confirm all of the following before submitting -->

- [ ] I have tested these changes on Termux (Android) or a Linux terminal
- [ ] `bash -n` syntax check passes on all modified files
- [ ] All user-facing strings use `CT_*` language variables from `lang.sh`
- [ ] No hardcoded single-language text in module scripts
- [ ] No emoji in any script output
- [ ] No inline comments (`#`) in script logic (shebang only)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` has been updated
- [ ] All live practice commands target only authorized public test hosts
- [ ] My changes do not facilitate unauthorized access to any system
- [ ] I have read and agree to the [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md) and [Contributing Guidelines](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
